subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! Praise be unto His Divine Unity, Who through His infinite bounties hath favoured His loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی حمد حضرت احدیت را که بفیوضات نامتناهیه احبای خویش را فائز
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @exhortations and counsels, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
